'''''Star Wars'' 5''' is the fifth issue of the [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'']]. It was written by [[Roy Thomas]], illustrated by [[Howard Chaykin]], and first published by [[Marvel Comics]] on [[August 10]], [[1977]]. It features the story "'''Lo, the Moons of Yavin!'''", which adapts scenes from the film [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']].

==Publisher's summary==
''With the stolen plans, the Rebels begin their attack on the Death Star.''

==Plot summary==
[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], and [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] flee the Death Star to the Rebel Alliance base on the moon [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. There they deliver [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] to the Rebels, who use the information he is carrying to create a plan to destroy the Death Star. Meanwhile, the Death Star has followed the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] to the Rebel base intent on destroying it. Panicked, the Rebels send their pilots on a mission to destroy the Death Star. Luke, who has decided to help the Rebels, meets up with his old friend [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]] as they get ready to blast off into space.

==Continuity==
Unlike the [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|film]], ''Star Wars'' 5 identifies [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] as [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron]]. The name "Blue Squadron" was previously used in the film's [[Star Wars: A New Hope (novelization)|novelization]] by [[Alan Dean Foster]].<ref name="Novel">[[Star Wars: A New Hope (novelization)|''Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope'' novelization]]</ref>
